chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-483 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.11.2025 Mr. Mohsin Raza Gopang, advocate for petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w Assistant SGA&CD (Jabir Jabbar) *** Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that case of the present petitioners is akin to the case of petitioner in C.P No.D-6790 of 2018, which was disposed of by means of Order dated 22.05.2019, therefore, he seeks disposal of the instant petition in terms of above referred Order. Learned AAG raised no objection to the proposition. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of alongwith pending application(s) with direction to respondents No.2 and 3 to decide the pending application of petitioner strictly in accordance with law and policy in vogue preferably within a period of 45 days from the date of this Order. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
